source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Cicada
identity.motif: cicada wing and shell documentation system

typography: Geist for precise English documentation UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, field notes, tables, and measured numeric rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px documentation grids, wing-lattice dividers, bark-grain panels, compact notes, readable tables, and quiet summer-woods hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent cicada motif
prompts.prompt: Create a high-resolution isolated Morphous motif source: a clearly recognizable cicada seen from above, with translucent amber veined wings, bark-grey shed-shell body and thorax, shell black-brown segmented details, fine legs, crisp wing lattice, and restrained moss-green woodland accents only where naturally appropriate. Center the complete cicada with generous padding on all sides; do not crop wings, legs, antennae, or body. Place it on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparent removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, edge glow, text, watermark, props, bark perch, leaves, landscape, or second insect. Workflow record: generated as .source/motif-chroma.png, then converted to RGBA motif.png by removing the #ff00ff chroma key with soft matte and despill.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Cicada" / "Morphous Cicada", source reference for a textural documentation shadcn/tweakcn theme. Derive the system from a cicada wing and shell motif in summer woods: translucent amber wing veining, wing-vein gold, bark-grey shell structure, shell charcoal and summer-bark depth, moss-green support states, pale bark paper, dry shell, and cream wing neutrals. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation/sidebar, documentation app preview, forms, table, command/search, charts, empty/error/loading states, badges, alerts, texture/pattern, spacing, radius, shadow, and tokens. Use precise 8px grids, wing-lattice dividers, bark-grain panels, amber documentation accents, moss support marks, and dense but readable field-note hierarchy. Exclude unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, stock UI kit styling, random brands, watermarks, illegible text, and misspellings.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Cicada" / "Morphous Cicada", translated from the light board and the same cicada wing and shell motif. Keep deep bark charcoal and shell black-brown surfaces, translucent amber primary highlights, wing-vein gold focus, moss-green support states, pale wing-line text, bark-grey borders, wing-lattice dividers, bark texture, 8px radius, compact documentation tables, and textural summer-woods field-note rhythm. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation/sidebar, documentation app preview, forms, table, command/search, charts, empty/error/loading states, badges, alerts, texture/pattern, spacing, radius, shadow, and tokens. Exclude neon colors, unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, pure black-only backgrounds, illegible text, random brands, watermarks, and misspellings.
